<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Exceptions; use Exception; final class DatasetArgumentsMismatch extends Exception { public function __construct(int $requiredCount, int $suppliedCount) { if ($requiredCount <= $suppliedCount) { parent::__construct('Test argument names and dataset keys do not match'); } else { parent::__construct(sprintf('Test expects %d arguments but dataset only provides %d', $requiredCount, $suppliedCount)); } } // }
